items.name: Aurora Noctis Wings
items.description: The "Aurora Noctis" wings boast a stunning contrast between radiant gold and deep black, capturing the essence of twilight. Each feather transitions seamlessly from shimmering gold at the base to velvety black at the tips, emanating an aura of both beauty and mystique. These wings symbolize the harmony between light and darkness, commanding attention with their celestial elegance.
